GG0170D1_STND_STRT_CD GG0170D1 Mobility: Sitting to Standing Ability at SOC/ROC Indicates the patient's ability to move to a standing position from a sitting position in achair or on the side of the bed at the start of care/resumption of care. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
05. Setup or clean-up assistance – Helper sets up or cleans up; patient completes activity. Helper assists only prior to or
